calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2005 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2005 Continued To Mar-01-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Lana Rishina, Esq. for Plaintiff: Faye Bernstein & Assoc.
Plaintiff's witness: Faye Bernstein, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Gerson/Overstreet aka Gerson/Overstreet Architects as follows:
Damages $24,267.50
Prejudgment Interest $11,416.25
Costs $314.50 for a total of $35,998.25
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Continued To Jan-13-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
